svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

31px;">each answer records a signal</font></span></li><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));"><font style="font-size: 31px;">decisions are based on dominant signals on each axis</font></span></li><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));"><font style="font-size: 31px;">reflections are pre-defined</font></span></li></ul></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380.5" width="470" x="20" y="2630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nK99E_-hG5iyxk9Gkhvj-72"
